response.justification: Strong generalist software craftsman with 10+ years of full-stack experience and recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG/vector databases, multi-agent frameworks, and cloud-native AI architectures required for a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role. Customer-facing technical leadership and discovery experience are not clearly evidenced.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, multiple languages, and AWS CDK
Recent work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, talks)
concerns: No explicit production GenAI, RAG, or vector database experience listed
No demonstrated multi-agent framework work (LangGraph, CrewAI) or LLM evaluation/observability
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery or Staff-level forward-deployed consulting

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic tooling work
